name: Xgolf America Inc
about: X-Golf America Inc operates a network of indoor golf simulator venues that combine high-tech simulation with a sports bar atmosphere. The venues feature proprietary golf simulator technology with floor and ceiling sensors, providing an accurate and innovative golfing experience. Patrons can play famous golf courses from around the world and enjoy a full bar and food menu, making it suitable for both golf practice and social gatherings. The business model centers on affordable simulator rentals and caters to a broad market including families, amateur golfers, and professionals.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to the world's most accurate indoor golf simulators with proprietary technology
Ability to play famous golf courses from around the world year-round, rain or shine
Integration of a full bar and food menu for a complete entertainment experience
Real-time data and statistics on industry-leading technology for game improvement

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen menu including wings, pizza, giant soft pretzels and more
Full bar with a variety of beverages, including signature cocktails like the John Daly cocktail with Good Boy Vodka

simulator_hardware.notes: Proprietary impact sensor with floor and ceiling sensors for the most accurate golf simulator experience

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: The FAQ does not specify whether clubs are provided, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs to ensure the best fit and familiarity.

faq.question: Can I bring outside food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has its own full bar and kitchen, offering wings, pizza, pretzels, and various beverages. It is not explicitly stated if outside food and drinks are allowed.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The content does not provide a specific time estimate for playing 18 holes.

faq.question: Is X-Golf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, X-Golf caters to families and offers activities for all ages and levels, making it a kid-friendly environment.
